mapper.insert:
SELECT shop_board_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO shop_board (item_id, item_title, item_content, item_price, updated_at) VALUES (#{itemId},#{itemTitle}, #{itemContent}, #{itemPrice}, sysdate)

SELECT image_info_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO image_info (image_id, image_uuid, image_original_name, image_url, image_hash_code, item_id) VALUES (#{imageId}, #{imageUuid}, #{imageOriginalName}, #{imageUrl}, #{imageHashCode}, #{itemId})
mapper.select:
SELECT s.item_id, s.item_title, s.item_content, s.item_date, s.item_price, i.image_url, i.img_feature_order as hashCode, i.img_feature_value as bitArray
FROM shop_board s LEFT JOIN image_info i ON s.item_id = i.item_id WHERE s.item_id = #{id}

SELECT s.item_id, s.item_title, s.item_content, s.item_date, s.item_price, i.image_url, i.image_hash_code as hashCode FROM shop_board s LEFT JOIN image_info i ON s.item_id = i.item_id WHERE s.item_id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE s, i FROM shop_board s LEFT JOIN image_info i ON s.item_id = i.item_id WHERE s.item_id =#{id}
